title: quercus pedunculata subsp. pedunculiflora
intro: Quercus pedunculata subsp. pedunculiflora is a subspecies of evergreen tree in the family Fagaceae, commonly known as the pedunculate oak. The leaves and bark of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Quercus pedunculata subsp. pedunculiflora include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
